5551234567.summary: Customer received wrong books for order BK-1003 (expected Introduction to Algorithms and The Art of Computer Programming, received El Hombre en Busca de Sentido and Lazos de Amor). Return initiated (RT-101), flagged for human review due to order over $300. Photo of wrong items saved. Customer is a Gold loyalty member, 4-year customer with ~$2,100 annual spend.
